title: India's Insolvency Framework: IBC (Amendment) Act, 2026 - A Game Changer!
content:
# India's Insolvency Framework: IBC (Amendment) Act, 2026 - A Game Changer!

Ek important update hai. Government ne India ke insolvency framework ko further strengthen karne ke liye **Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Act, 2026** announce kiya hai, jiske baare mein PIB ne May 28, 2026 ko details provide kiye hain. Yeh amendment insolvency resolution process ko aur zyada efficient, predictable aur time-bound banane ke liye laaya gaya hai.

Is Act ke through Indian insolvency ecosystem mein kaafi significant reforms laye gaye hain:

*   **Faster Resolution:** Naye provisions procedural delays ko reduce karenge aur cases ke admission aur approval ke liye timelines ko strengthen karenge, jisse resolution process mein speed aayegi.
*   **Enhanced Creditor Oversight:** Liquidation proceedings ke dauraan Committee of Creditors (CoCs) ka role aur expand kiya gaya hai, ensuring better control aur outcomes.
*   **Clarity on Key Aspects:** Security interests, avoidance transactions aur resolution plans se related provisions ko aur clear kiya gaya hai, jisse legal ambiguities kam hongi.
*   **Safeguards for Resolution Plans:** Approved resolution plans ke implementation ke liye naye safeguards introduce kiye gaye hain, jinme licenses, permits aur regulatory approvals ki continuity bhi shamil hai.
*   **Creditor-Initiated Insolvency Resolution Process (CIIRP):** Specified categories ke corporate debtors ke liye creditor-initiated insolvency resolution process introduce kiya gaya hai, jo ek major feature hai.
*   **Fraudulent Trading:** Fraudulent aur wrongful trading se related provisions ko bhi strengthen kiya gaya hai.

Yeh amendments, IBC ke 2016 mein aane ke ek decade baad ki learnings par based hain, aur inka aim hai ki financial distress ko deal karne mein India ka framework globally competitive aur robust bane.
